summary: اختبار الميزات الجديدة: FreeShippingBanner, الإعلانات, عروض فلاش, التوجيه الذكي, تقييم الأسعار, الإحالات. جميع APIs تعمل بنجاح 100%. الواجهة الأمامية تعرض جميع العناصر بشكل صحيح.

minor.issue: كان يعطي 500 بسبب مقارنة datetime بدون timezone
minor.fix_applied: Added timezone awareness check in settings.py line 223

critical_code_review_comments: FreeShippingBanner.js: Clean unified component with variant support (food=green, products=blue)
ProductsPage.js: Correctly imports and uses FreeShippingBanner, ads, flash, best sellers, newly added sections
FoodPage.js: Correctly imports FreeShippingBanner with variant='food'
FoodStorePage.js: Correctly displays priceRating badge from API
smart_routing.py: Well-structured service using Haversine formula and OSRM API
food_orders.py: optimize-route endpoint at line 2042-2100 working correctly
price_reports.py: Store rating endpoint at line 416-530 working correctly
referrals.py: my-code endpoint at line 61-93 working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 72 are working: 1) FreeShippingBanner component unified across ProductsPage and FoodPage, 2) Ads banner with auto-rotate in ProductsPage, 3) Flash products with countdown timer, 4) Best sellers section, 5) Newly added section, 6) Smart routing API at /api/food/orders/delivery/optimize-route requires driver auth, 7) Price rating at /api/price-reports/store/{store_id}/rating, 8) Referrals at /api/referrals/my-code requires auth

food_store_page.price_rating_badge: WORKING - shows 'أسعار ممتازة' with dollar icon

bug_fixed_in_testing.issue: datetime comparison between offset-naive and offset-aware objects
bug_fixed_in_testing.fix: Added timezone awareness check: if end_date.tzinfo is None: end_date = end_date.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
